name: apartment-booking-root
description: Full-stack apartment booking application for Germany

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run dev" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.start: cd backend && npm install && npm start
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build

author: Your Name
